faq.title: Answers to common questions
faq.subtitle: Main questions about LLM Apps. For detailed inquiries:
faq.certDescription: At Cleverit we have the certification of
faq.certName: Microsoft Solutions Partner | Digital & App Innovation
faq.certFooter: Your business in the hands of a Microsoft-recognized specialist.
faq.certFeature1: Modernize and migrate your enterprise applications to the cloud
faq.certFeature2: Boost your developers' productivity with Microsoft Azure

question1.q: What value does implementing LLM Apps bring to my organization?
question1.a:
**LLMApp** is a platform that allows you to create and manage **multiple specialized AI agents**, each with its own database, training examples, and specific configuration.

This enables organizations to have different agents focused on different business areas (sales, support, operations, etc.), transforming scattered information into **intelligent conversational assistants** that improve:

• **Productivity**
• **Decision-making**
• **Internal user experience**

question2.q: What integrations does the platform support and how do they improve responses?
question2.a:
The **LLMApp platform** integrates with:

• **SharePoint** (enterprise documents)
• **Databases** (SQL Server, MySQL, PostgreSQL, MongoDB, BigQuery, etc.)
• **Files** (PDF, Excel, Word, images)
• **REST and GraphQL APIs**
• **MCP** (Model Context Protocol)

**Important:** Agents are trained with **personalized business examples** that teach how and when to use each source, achieving **much more accurate and relevant** responses.

question3.q: How long does the LLMApp platform implementation take?
question3.a:
The **LLMApp** implementation project is designed to be agile and comprehensive, ensuring your organization can start leveraging AI benefits in the shortest time possible.

The base setup duration is **3 weeks**: 1 week for platform and infrastructure configuration, 2 weeks for creation and adjustments of the first agent. Each additional agent requires approximately **2 more weeks**.

question4.q: What does the initial setup include?
question4.a:
The **LLMApp** initial setup includes everything needed to launch your AI agents platform:

Multi-agent platform setup, connection with client data, agent creation and configuration, database schema generation per agent, training examples definition, Mastra chat interface, agent management, functional testing, and Azure deployment.

Additionally includes:
• **Alerts creation**
• **Custom dashboards**
• **Automated reports**

question5.q: What are the implementation and monthly usage costs?
question5.a:
**Implementation (one-time payment):**
• Initial setup: **USD 4,200** (includes platform + infrastructure + 1 agent)
• Each additional agent: **USD 2,000**

**Monthly Usage (recurring):**
Tiered by users:
• 0-100 users: **USD 10/user**
• 100-500 users: **USD 7/user**
• 500-1000 users: **USD 5/user**
• 3000+ users: **USD 3/user**

**Monthly Support:**
• **Basic Support: USD 2,500** (included in all implementations)
• **Medium Support: USD 4,000**
• **Pro Support: USD 5,000**

question6.q: What does the USD 2,500 monthly Basic Support include?
question6.a:
Basic Support includes **EVERYTHING needed to operate:**

• **Complete Azure infrastructure** (Container Registry, Container Apps, Azure Foundry, PostgreSQL)
• **Complete Azure CSP management**
• **Platform operational maintenance**
• **Monthly monitoring** (status, logs, failure detection)
• **Technical incident response with SLA**
• **Monthly patches and updates**
• **Monthly system review**

It's a **predictable fixed cost** that includes EVERYTHING.

question7.q: What are the differences between Medium and Pro Support?
question7.a:
**Medium Support (USD 4,000/month):**
Basic Support + **20 monthly hours** for improvements, bi-weekly monitoring, prompt and agent optimization, functional adjustments.

**Pro Support (USD 5,000/month):**
Medium Support + **30 additional hours (50 hrs total)**, AI model fine-tuning, dataset expansion, advanced observability with dashboards, custom alerts, and analytical reports.

case1.title: Retail Intelligence
case1.excerpt: Sales and customer experience optimization through predictive inventory analysis, purchase behavior insights, and real-time personalization.
case1.fullContent: In the modern retail sector, understanding customer behavior and optimizing inventory is crucial to maintaining competitiveness. Retail Intelligence is an AI solution that transforms sales data, inventory, and customer behavior into actionable insights to drive sales and improve customer experience.

applications.title: ⚙️ LLMAPPS Applicability in Retail
applications.subtitle: Your LLMAPPS platform can position itself as a cognitive layer of analysis and optimization over retail operations. Here are the concrete lines of application:

app1.title: 1. Sales and Inventory Analysis Assistant
app1.challenge: Retail managers need to analyze inventory by store, track sales by product category, and detect stockouts before they affect sales without consulting multiple systems.
app1.capabilities: LLMAPPS integrates data from stores, products, inventory, and sales_transactions. Enables natural language queries about stock levels per store/product, sales analysis by category, and proactive replenishment alerts.

sub: "Which products have less than 50 units at the Downtown store?"
"What's the Electronics stock level across all stores?"
"Show products with critical quantity by store_id"
"What were the top 10 best-selling products this month?"
"Which category generated the most total_amount last week?"
"Compare sales between Owned vs Rented stores"

features.main: Automatic replenishment alerts based on sales velocity and current stock.
Executive reports with profitability per product (sale_price vs cost_price).

app1.value: Reduces stockouts by 30%, improves inventory turnover, and optimizes purchasing decisions with real-time visibility of inventory levels per store.

app2.title: 2. Personalized Recommendation Engine
app2.challenge: Sales teams lack insights into purchase patterns by customer segment (age, gender) and complementary products that could increase average ticket.
app2.capabilities: LLMAPPS analyzes sales_transactions, sales_details, customers, and products to identify purchase patterns, frequently bought together products, and demographic preferences.

sub: "What products do women aged 25-35 buy most?"
"Which categories do customers using Credit Card vs Cash prefer?"
"Identify complementary products bought in the same transaction"

features.main: Contextual recommendations based on sales_details history:
sub: "Customers who bought product_id X also bought Y in 60% of cases"
"Suggest products to increase average total_amount of transactions"
"Recommend products with high in_store_priority for promotions"

features.main: Customer segmentation by first_name, age, gender, and purchase behavior.
Cross-selling optimization based on transaction_time patterns (In-Person vs Digital).

app2.value: Increases conversion by 25%, raises average ticket (total_amount) by 15%, and improves customer satisfaction through data-driven recommendations.

app3.title: 3. Dynamic Pricing and Margin Optimization
app3.challenge: Pricing teams need to maximize margins by analyzing sale_price_per_unit vs cost_price, evaluate discount_coupon_amount impact, and adjust base_sale_price without eroding profitability.
app3.capabilities: LLMAPPS analyzes profitability comparing sale_price_per_unit (sales_details) with cost_price (products), tracks discount_coupon_amount effectiveness, and simulates pricing scenarios by category.

features.main: Profitability analysis by product and category:
sub: "What's the average margin (sale_price - cost_price) by category?"
"Compare profitability between Owned vs Rented stores considering property_cost"
"Simulate impact of reducing base_sale_price by 10% in Electronics"

features.main: Price adjustment suggestions based on inventory quantity and sales velocity.
Value_added_tax impact analysis on competitive pricing.

app3.value: Maximizes margins, reduces obsolete inventory through intelligent pricing, and improves competitiveness without eroding profitability.

app4.title: 4. Store and Worker Performance Analysis
app4.challenge: Store managers need to evaluate worker performance by sales generated, identify top performers, and optimize worker_shifts to maximize revenue during peak hours.
app4.capabilities: LLMAPPS links sales_transactions with workers and worker_shifts to analyze sales per employee, identify high-performance patterns, and optimize scheduling considering worker_vacations.

sub: "Which workers generate the highest average total_amount per transaction?"
"What's the performance of Cashiers vs Store Managers in sales?"
"Identify workers with more Completed vs POS_Failure transactions"
"Suggest workers for peak hours based on historical performance"

features.main: Store performance analysis by ownership_type and property_cost ROI.
Payment_method pattern identification (Credit Card, Debit Card, Cash) by worker.

app4.value: Optimizes scheduling to maximize revenue, identifies training needs for underperforming workers, and improves store ROI.

app5.title: 5. Customer Intelligence and Transaction Analysis
app5.challenge: Business analysts need to understand customer lifetime value, detect transaction failure patterns (POS_Failure), and analyze sale_type preferences (In-Person vs Digital).
app5.capabilities: LLMAPPS analyzes customers with sales_transactions to calculate CLV, detect transaction status patterns, identify loyal customers, and compare In-Person vs Digital behavior.

sub: "Who are the top 20 customers by cumulative total_amount?"
"What's the average CLV by age group and gender?"
"Identify customers with high purchase frequency but low total_amount"
"What percentage of transactions are POS_Failure by store_id?"
"Which payment_method has the highest Completed transaction rate?"
"Compare success rate between In-Person and Digital sales"

features.main: Customer segmentation by sale_type preference and payment_method.
Identification of inactive customers since date_created for re-engagement campaigns.

app5.value: Improves customer retention, reduces POS_Failure rates, and increases lifetime value through data-driven segmentation.

features: Custom dashboards by category and store
Integration with existing POS, ERP and e-commerce systems
case1.results: Retail companies that implement Retail Intelligence report a 20-25% increase in sales, a 30% reduction in stockouts, and a 40% increase in customer satisfaction. Managers make faster, data-driven decisions, resulting in better inventory turnover and personalized shopping experiences.

case2.title: Mining Intelligence
case2.excerpt: Intelligent management of mining operations with predictive safety analysis, resource optimization and real-time environmental monitoring.
case2.fullContent: The mining industry faces unique challenges in terms of safety, operational efficiency and environmental compliance. Mining Intelligence is an AI platform specifically designed for mining operations that transforms complex data from multiple sources into actionable information.
case2.challenge: Modern mining operations face multiple challenges: lack of centralized visibility over equipment, limited connectivity in dynamic tunnels, scattered information across systems, shortage of trained personnel for teleoperation, and critical equipment failing without warning in hazardous zones.
case2.solution: LLMAPPS positions itself as a cognitive orchestration layer and operational knowledge hub to address these critical challenges in modern mining.

applications.title: ⚙️ LLMAPPS Applicability
applications.subtitle: Your LLMAPPS platform ("Conversation with your business data") can position itself as a cognitive orchestration and operational knowledge layer over these problems. Here are the concrete application lines:

app1.title: 1. Intelligent Mining Agent for Supervision and Telemetry
app1.challenge: Challenge: Lack of centralized visibility over equipment, connectivity and risks.

features.main: Integrate with sources like PI System, SCADA, SAP PM, sensors and teleoperated robot logs.

sub: "Show me inactive telecommanded equipment in North Gallery 3."
"Which shovel has the highest probability of failure this week?"

features.main: Make proactive alerts in natural language (Teams, WhatsApp or web panel).
Complement current systems without replacing them.

app1.value: 👉 Value: Reduces diagnostic time, improves operational decisions without complex dashboards.

app2.title: 2. Predictive Maintenance RAG
app2.challenge: Challenge: Shovels fail in dangerous zones without warning or spare parts on time.

features.main: Create a RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation) model that reads historical maintenance reports and manufacturer manuals.

sub: "What critical components fail most in Caterpillar 2022 shovels?"
"What's the radiator failure probability in shovel 14 according to records?"

features.main: Integrate a technical risk scoring model and suggest preventive orders in SAP PM or similar.

app2.value: 👉 Value: Minimizes unexpected failures, prevents maintenance crew exposure.

app3.title: 3. Cognitive Connectivity and Terrain Control
app3.challenge: Challenge: Low connectivity in dynamic tunnels (temporary LTE / mesh Wi-Fi).

features.main: Integrate with network telemetry systems (Wi-Fi Mesh / private LTE) to understand which fronts have weak connection.

sub: "In which sectors does the mesh network have packet loss >10%?"
"How many shovels are out of coverage?"

features.main: Retrain models with dynamic topology (daily advances of 1.7m).

app3.value: 👉 Value: Anticipates operational interruptions and improves teleoperation continuity.

app4.title: 4. Cognitive Operations Twin
app4.challenge: Challenge: Information scattered across RFI, Excel, reports and sensors.

features.main: Unify all data under a semantic layer accessible through natural language.

sub: "Simulate what happens if I automate the explosives rail."
"What impact would teloperating the Boltec have on productivity and risk?"

app4.value: 👉 Value: Supports strategic decision-making in innovation and safety.

app5.title: 5. Technical Training Assistant
app5.challenge: Challenge: Lack of trained operators for teleoperation.

features.main: Include an AI-based training module with guided prompts like technical copilot:
sub: "Explain how to calibrate the Voltec for fortification in inclined gallery."
"Simulate a hydraulic failure and how to react."

features.main: Retrain personnel based on internal manuals and videos.

app5.value: 👉 Value: Democratizes technical knowledge and reduces learning curve.

videoSection.title: 🎥 Explanatory Video
videoSection.subtitle: Discover how LLMAPPS revolutionizes mining operations in this overview video of our solution.
videoSection.videoTitle: LLMAPPS for Mining - Complete Solution in English

features: Intelligent mining agent for supervision and telemetry
Predictive maintenance RAG to prevent failures
case2.results: LLMAPPS transforms mining operations through a cognitive layer that unifies scattered data, predicts critical failures, optimizes connectivity in dynamic terrains and democratizes technical knowledge. The result is a safer, more efficient operation prepared for modern mining challenges.

case3.title: Pulzen by LLM Apps
case3.excerpt: Advanced analysis of development team productivity with code metrics, delivery velocity and bottleneck prediction.
case3.fullContent: Modern software development teams generate a massive amount of data through commits, pull requests, issues and CI/CD metrics. Development Metrics is an AI solution that converts this data into actionable insights based on frameworks like SPACE, DORA and DevExp, allowing technical leaders to improve team productivity and optimize development processes.

applications.title: ⚙️ LLMAPPS Applicability in Software Development
applications.subtitle: Your LLMAPPS platform can position itself as an intelligent analysis and optimization layer for engineering teams. Here are the concrete lines of application:

app1.title: 1. Delivery Speed and Flow Efficiency
app1.challenge: Teams struggle to maintain fast development cycles while managing code reviews, approvals, and deployments without clear visibility into bottlenecks.
app1.capabilities: Pulzen measures key DORA and DevExp metrics like Deployment Frequency, Cycle Time, and Merge Frequency. Analyzes Code Review Velocity, Time to Approval, PR Merge Times, and Code Review Timing to identify delays.
app1.value: Reduces cycle times by up to 40%, identifies bottlenecks, and accelerates time-to-market.

app2.title: 2. Team Activity and Performance
app2.challenge: Managers need to understand productivity, identify top performers, and detect patterns without micromanagement.
app2.capabilities: Pulzen tracks commits, lines of code, deploy frequency, and PR activity. Includes Commit Score that evaluates value and impact through changes, additions, and deletions.
app2.value: Identifies top performers, balances workloads, and recognizes high-value contributions with quantitative data.

app3.title: 3. Code Quality and Reviews
app3.challenge: Maintaining quality while moving fast requires effective review processes and actionable metrics.
app3.capabilities: Pulzen analyzes code review with SPACE Framework: Code Review Velocity, number of reviews, approval rates, time to approval. Includes Workflow Detail with pipeline tracking (states: canceled, failed, successful) and duration.

features.main: Insights on efficiency and knowledge sharing

app3.value: Improves quality by 30%, reduces review times, and optimizes CI/CD.

app4.title: 4. GitHub Copilot and AI Tools Adoption
app4.challenge: Organizations invest in GitHub Copilot without visibility into actual usage, adoption, and ROI.
app4.capabilities: Pulzen integrates comprehensive GitHub Copilot metrics: seat usage, suggestion acceptance rate, lines accepted, chat usage, daily usage patterns. Analysis by IDE, language, user, and team.
app4.value: Maximizes Copilot ROI, identifies training opportunities, and ensures effective adoption.

app5.title: 5. Developer Wellbeing and Risk Detection
app5.challenge: Burnout and disengagement are costly but difficult to detect early.
app5.capabilities: Pulzen detects burnout through analysis of overactivity, after-hours work, and weekend work using VCS and Teams. Identifies Ghost Developers by comparing historical vs current activity to detect significant drops.
app5.value: Reduces turnover by 25%, detects burnout before crisis, and supports wellbeing with data-driven warnings.

features: Development velocity and delivery cycle analysis
Automatic detection of bottlenecks and blockers
Code quality metrics and technical debt
Delivery date prediction based on historical velocity
Custom dashboards for different technical roles
case3.results: Teams that implement Development Metrics report a 30% increase in delivery velocity, a 25% reduction in production bugs and a 40% improvement in estimation accuracy. Technical leaders gain clear visibility into team health and can intervene proactively before issues affect delivery.
